Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Imperialist Guilds]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — There are four Imperialist Guilds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 18''' — The Imperialist Guilds are gathering for an attack.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 17''' — The Imperialist Guilds have seized on the assassination of one of their number to launch an attack.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — The Imperialist Guilds named Calder as the Steward.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — The Imperialist Guilds make a grand procession.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Calder is representing the Imperialist Guilds.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — A meeting is scheduled with the Imperialist Guilds in a week.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — The Imperialist Guilds include the Blackwatch and the Navigators.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — Imperialist Guilds hold major contracts in the Capital.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
